content: Tauri 2 + Next.js 15 static export: set output:'export', images.unoptimized:true. Example repos: motz0815/tauri-nextjs-starter (Tauri v2 + Next.js v15), kvnxiao/tauri-nextjs-template. Monorepo pattern works well. Tauri builds the static Next.js out/ folder into an Android APK via pnpm tauri android build. PWA as fallback if Tauri fails.
